contents:
(** * Induced wild categories *)

(** A map [A -> B] of types, where [B] is some type of wild category, induces the same level of structure on [A], via taking everything to be defined on the image.

This needs to be separate from Core because of [HasEquivs] usage.  We don't make these definitions (exported) [Instance]s because we only want to apply them manually, but we make them [Local Instance]s so that subsequent ones can pick up the previous ones automatically. *)

(** In most of the proofs, we only want to use [intro] on variables of type [A], so this will be handy. *)

Ltac intros_of_type A :=
  repeat match goal with |- forall (a : A), _ => intro a end.
Local Instance isgraph_induced `{IsGraph B} : IsGraph A.
Local Instance is01cat_induced `{Is01Cat B} : Is01Cat A.

goals.conclusion: (f b $-> f c) -> (f a $-> f b) -> f a $-> f c
(f b $-> f c) -> (f a $-> f b) -> f a $-> f c

contents: Local Instance is0gpd_induced `{Is0Gpd B} : Is0Gpd A.

goals.conclusion: (f a $-> f b) -> f b $-> f a

contents: (** The structure map along which we induce the category structure becomes a functor with respect to the induced structure. *)
Local Instance is0functor_induced `{IsGraph B} : Is0Functor f.

goals.conclusion: (f a $-> f b) -> f a $-> f b

contents: Local Instance is2graph_induced `{Is2Graph B} : Is2Graph A.

goals.conclusion: (f a $-> f b) -> (f a $-> f b) -> Type

contents: Local Instance is1cat_induced `{Is1Cat B} : Is1Cat A.

goals.conclusion: forall g : f b $-> f c, Is0Functor (cat_comp g)
forall f0 : f a $-> f b, Is0Functor (cat_precomp c f0)

forall (f0 : f a $-> f b) (g : f b $-> f c) (h : f c $-> f d),
h $o g $o f0 $-> h $o (g $o f0)

forall (f0 : f a $-> f b) (g : f b $-> f c) (h : f c $-> f d),
h $o (g $o f0) $-> h $o g $o f0
forall f0 : f a $-> f b, Id (f b) $o f0 $-> f0
forall f0 : f a $-> f b, f0 $o Id (f a) $-> f0
forall g : f b $-> f c, Is0Functor (cat_comp g)
forall f0 : f a $-> f b, Is0Functor (cat_precomp c f0)

forall (f0 : f a $-> f b) (g : f b $-> f c) (h : f c $-> f d),
h $o g $o f0 $-> h $o (g $o f0)

forall (f0 : f a $-> f b) (g : f b $-> f c) (h : f c $-> f d),
h $o (g $o f0) $-> h $o g $o f0
forall f0 : f a $-> f b, Id (f b) $o f0 $-> f0
forall f0 : f a $-> f b, f0 $o Id (f a) $-> f0

contents: Local Instance is1functor_induced `{Is1Cat B} : Is1Functor f.

goals.conclusion: forall f0 g : f a $-> f b, (f0 $-> g) -> f0 $== g
forall (f0 : f a $-> f b) (g : f b $-> f c), g $o f0 $== g $o f0
forall f0 g : f a $-> f b, (f0 $-> g) -> f0 $== g
forall (f0 : f a $-> f b) (g : f b $-> f c), g $o f0 $== g $o f0
forall f0 g : f a $-> f b, IsEquiv GpdHom_path

contents: srapply Build_HasEquivs; intros a b; cbn.

goals.conclusion: forall f0 : f a $-> f b, ?Goal0 f0 -> ?Goal
forall (f0 : f a $-> f b) (fe : ?Goal0 f0), ?Goal1 (?Goal3 f0 fe) $-> f0
forall f0 : ?Goal, ?Goal5 f0 $o ?Goal1 f0 $-> Id (f a)
forall f0 : ?Goal, ?Goal1 f0 $o ?Goal5 f0 $-> Id (f b)

forall (f0 : f a $-> f b) (g : f b $-> f a),
(f0 $o g $-> Id (f b)) -> (g $o f0 $-> Id (f a)) -> ?Goal0 f0
f a $<~> f b -> f a $-> f b
forall f0 : f a $<~> f b, CatIsEquiv' (f a) (f b) f0
forall f0 : f a $-> f b, CatIsEquiv' (f a) (f b) f0 -> f a $<~> f b

forall (f0 : f a $-> f b) (fe : CatIsEquiv' (f a) (f b) f0),
cate_buildequiv' (f a) (f b) f0 fe $-> f0
f a $<~> f b -> f b $-> f a
forall f0 : f a $<~> f b, cate_inv' (f a) (f b) f0 $o f0 $-> Id (f a)
forall f0 : f a $<~> f b, f0 $o cate_inv' (f a) (f b) f0 $-> Id (f b)

forall (f0 : f a $-> f b) (g : f b $-> f a),
(f0 $o g $-> Id (f b)) ->
(g $o f0 $-> Id (f a)) -> CatIsEquiv' (f a) (f b) f0
